overall_justification: While the edition mentions the "Caixa de Conversão" and related concepts like fixing the value of gold, the overall tone is descriptive and focused on reporting the initial stages of the debate in the Câmara.  Wencesláo Escobar's criticisms are presented, but the newspaper itself doesn't explicitly endorse either an Orthodox or Expansionist position.  The article primarily serves to inform readers about the commencement of discussions and the initial arguments presented.

supporting_evidence.quote: A creação da caixa do conversão começou a ser discutida hontem, na Gamara-, depois Uas votações da 1" parlo da ordem Uo Uia, só tendo tido tempo Uo falar o Sr. Weneesláo Escobar, quo combateu o projecto, "quo de conversão só.tom o noiiic-" o "quo pretendendo lixar o valor do ouro nada lixa'1.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote sets the context, highlighting the start of the debate and summarizing a key criticism without expressing the newspaper's own view.
